meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS starter kit to Solve slow development speed (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome slow development speed. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: SaaS Starter Kit: Ship Faster for Freelancers (Checklist)
content.seo_description: Stop manual coding and start shipping. Use this SaaS starter kit checklist with Antigravity and Claude Code to accelerate your freelance development workflow.
content.answer_block: To eliminate slow development cycles, adopt a production-ready SaaS starter kit. By leveraging boilerplate architecture, you bypass repetitive boilerplate setup. Use Antigravity to scaffold your infrastructure and Claude Code to automate feature implementation, effectively cutting your time-to-market by 70% while maintaining enterprise-grade code quality.
content.intro:
Every hour spent configuring authentication, database schemas, or payment webhooks is an hour you aren't billing your clients. The 'blank page' syndrome is the silent killer of freelance profitability, turning high-value projects into grueling marathons of repetitive boilerplate tasks.

But the era of manual configuration is over. By integrating a hardened SaaS starter kit with intelligent CLI orchestration, you transform from a manual coder into a high-velocity AI Architect. This isn't just about writing code faster; it's about building a repeatable machine that lets you ship complex SaaS products in days, not months.

steps.title: Initialize the Foundation
steps.description: Scaffold your project with a pre-configured SaaS boilerplate that includes essential middleware, database connectivity, and environment management.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a new project structure using a production-grade SaaS starter kit with Next.js, Supabase, and Stripe integration.

steps.title: Configure Auth & Database
steps.description: Automate the setup of secure authentication flows and relational database schemas to ensure data integrity from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Set up authentication middleware and define the initial user schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'setup user authentication with row-level security for multi-tenancy'

steps.title: Implement Billing Webhooks
steps.description: Don't write billing logic by hand. Use AI to integrate Stripe webhooks that handle subscription events reliably.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust Stripe webhook handler for subscription creation, upgrades, and cancellation events.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create stripe webhook handler and map to database subscription status'

steps.title: Rapid UI Component Injection
steps.description: Use your starter kit's design system to inject functional UI components without manual CSS styling.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a responsive dashboard layout using the existing component library provided in the starter kit.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate dashboard view with data tables and stats cards using existing design tokens'

steps.title: Automated Testing & QA
steps.description: Ensure your boilerplate remains stable by automating unit tests for critical paths like login and checkout.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write Playwright tests for the full user onboarding flow including registration and subscription.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'add e2e tests for registration flow using playwright'

pro_tips: Always use environment-specific variables for your SaaS starter kit to prevent hardcoded configuration leaks.
Leverage the 'Context' feature in Claude Code to feed it your entire schema file before generating new CRUD features.
Treat your SaaS starter kit as an evolving product; maintain a private repo of your 'gold standard' boilerplate.
Prioritize type safety by enforcing strict TypeScript configurations in your Antigravity setup to catch bugs before runtime.
Use AI to document your code as you write it; a self-documenting codebase is the ultimate client deliverable.
content.next_steps: Once your foundation is built, begin by shipping a single core feature to production. Use the feedback loop from your first client to refine your boilerplate, turning it into your own unique competitive advantage.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting the boilerplate and start scaling your freelance business with automated, high-velocity development workflows. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
